meta.title: Jupyter Llama
meta.description:
A Jupyter Notebook Chat Assistant built on Llama 2.
- Upload pdf or text files for analysis.
- No data goes to OpenAI.
- No data is used for training language models.

Links:
Google Colab Notebook (Updated to match the CodeLlama video: https://youtu.be/rjSWCMVbD_U) https://colab.research.google.com/drive/17GjLg0zB6VSpFcoO_r_wZtaGqNV6VCxC?usp=sharing
Find Trelis on HuggingFace: https://huggingface.co/Trelis
GPTQ Repo: https://github.com/PanQiWei/AutoGPTQ/
GPTQ Models on HuggingFace: https://huggingface.co/TheBloke/Llama-2-7b-Chat-GPTQ
